prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Harrop HTV 2650 TVS supercharger kit (engine code: AJ20P, 5.0L V8) with a custom pulley reduction to 3.25" (stock: 3.5"), paired with a Litchfield intercooler and heat exchanger for sustained 720hp/680lb-ft on 93 octane fuel, utilizing a Motec M150 ECU for precise boost control and ignition timing optimization

Full exhaust system replacement with a custom 3.5" titanium Borla Atak cat-back system (SVR-specific routing) and a secondary X-pipe merge before the rear valved mufflers, paired with a Milltek Sport de-cat downpipe (200-cell) for improved scavenging and a 12% reduction in backpressure

Suspension overhaul with KW Automotive Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 8-position rebound, 12-position compression, 16-way low-speed compression) featuring SVR-specific spring rates (front: 800lb/in, rear: 700lb/in) and spherical top mounts from SuperPro for zero compliance, paired with a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) and rear sway bar (22mm) to eliminate body roll in high-G corners
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the Wald International 'Black Bison' aero kit (SVR-specific fenders, side skirts, and rear diffuser) with integrated carbon fiber cooling ducts for the front brakes, paired with a custom 3D-printed front splitter (carbon fiber layup) extending 4" for increased downforce

Custom forged 22" BBS FI-R wheels (9.5" front, 11" rear) with a staggered offset (ET35 front, ET25 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 front, 315/25 rear) for maximum mechanical grip, paired with a custom gold anodized finish and center-lock adapters for quick swaps

Full interior rewrap in Alcantara with custom diamond stitching (SVR-specific pattern) by Royal Steering Wheels, featuring a bespoke carbon fiber shift knob (AJ20P engraved), a digital dash overlay from AIM MXS Strada (1.3" OLED display), and rear seat delete with a custom aluminum roll cage (T45 steel, 6-point) for rigidity and weight reduction
